top.name: Infinity Loop
top.rules_text: Gain 5 charges. For the rest of this turn your charge costs are halved (round up).

channel.name: Infinity Loop (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Charge costs are 0 for this turn

bottom.name: Living Spell
bottom.rules_text: Exile a spell from hand. Summon a Living Spell on target tile (HP = spell's mana cost x5DMG = mana cost x2). Living Spell casts the exiled spell on nearest enemy each turn.

channel.name: Living Spell (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Living Spell also has +2 speed
